reviews.review_title: 🐾 Colorful Twist on the Classic Plank
reviews.review_description:
Plank and Kitty is a plank-style VR game where your mission is simple but nerve-racking: save a cat from falling off the top of a building. The funniest part? The cat itself seems incredibly calm and completely unconcerned about the danger, which adds a lighthearted and humorous tone to the experience 😄.

Unlike many plank games that aim for ultra-realism, Plank and Kitty fully embraces a cartoon-style world. The environments are bright, playful, and very colorful, making the experience feel more fun than terrifying—perfect for players who want thrills without full-on stress.

The core mechanics are easy to understand, making it accessible to newcomers, and the studio has already confirmed that new content is on the way, which is encouraging for replayability.

A fun, friendly take on the plank genre, great to share with friends or introduce someone to VR in a light and entertaining way.
